{{Quote|Someday we will topple the Toniths from their lofty perch.|Hego Damask to Larsh Hill|<ref name="Darth Plagueis (novel)">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref>}}
The '''Tonith family''' was a [[Muun/Legends|Muun]] family who had been active in the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] for several generations prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. By [[67 BBY/Legends|67 BBY]], they controlled the Banking Clan. They were known for their ruthlessness, using force against rivals and the conquest of [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] as routine business procedures. [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Pors Tonith/Legends|Pors Tonith]] was a notable member of the family. [[Reep Tonith]] was another member of the Tonith family.
